MainHero.description: I turn ideas into neat and logical code. I love well-thought-out interfaces, semantics, and aesthetics in everything I do.

interactiveText.title: About me
interactiveText.paragraph1: I am a <dev>frontend developer</dev> specializing in building <perf>high-performance</perf> and <access>accessible</access> interfaces.
interactiveText.paragraph2: In code, I value <types>strict typing</types>, clean <architecture>architecture</architecture>, and <pixel>pixel-perfect</pixel> layout. I believe details matter.
